subcodes.first_line: ...Whatsoever driveth thee away from the one true God and shutteth thee out from the Best-Beloved is blameworthy and reprehensible
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جانهای پاک پاکی و آزادگی بدلست نه بتن بجانست نه بجامه و پیرهن انسان اگر
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @nearness and remoteness, @meditation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
